segment.source: A dismissible, toast-style notice with a colored variant, matching icon, and optional inline action link. Use it inline within page content to flag status, success, a warning, or an error to visitors. Configure the message body (rich text), an optional heading, the type (info, success, warning, or error) which sets color, icon, and screen-reader urgency, an action button text and link, and whether it can be dismissed.
